inputs.task_summary: Our Laravel API intermittently returns 500s under load. We found queue jobs are configured with retry_after=60 while the job timeout is 180 seconds. Proposal: keep both values and add more workers to absorb the duplicate deliveries.
evidence: duplicate job executions observed in logs

inputs.task_summary: Test suite fails only in CI: a test asserts an exact created_at timestamp equals now(). Proposal: freeze time with the framework's time-travel helper in the test setup.
evidence: assertion compares Carbon::now() to a stored timestamp
passes locally, fails on slower CI runners

inputs.task_summary: A dashboard page makes one database query per row to fetch each item's owner name, 500 rows per page. Proposal: eager-load the owner relation in the controller query.
evidence: query log shows 501 queries per page load

inputs.task_summary: To speed up deployments, proposal: run database migrations automatically inside every web container's entrypoint at boot, so all 6 replicas run migrate on startup.
evidence: 6 replicas start concurrently on each deploy

inputs.task_summary: A webhook consumer processes payment events. Proposal: verify the webhook signature with the shared secret before acting, and reject requests older than 5 minutes using the signed timestamp.
evidence: current handler trusts the payload without verification

inputs.task_summary: App boots fine locally but crashes in production with class-not-found for a dev-only package. Proposal: composer require the dev package into production dependencies so the class always exists.

Third-party REST API sometimes returns 429 with a Retry-After header. Proposal: honor Retry-After with bounded exponential backoff and cap total retries at 3, failing the job afterwards for the failed-jobs table.
A nightly job deletes soft-deleted records older than 30 days. Proposal: switch the delete to a single unbatched DELETE covering millions of rows during peak evening traffic to simplify the code.
constraints: database is shared with the live API
evidence: table holds ~40M rows, ~2M eligible per run
